content:
🧪 GAMEPLAY VALIDATION COMPLETE

✅ PASSED TESTS:
• Movement: Forward/backward for both players working correctly
• Jump mechanics: Proper physics and ground detection
• Block system: 20% damage reduction + visual effects
• Attack system: All punches/kicks functional with proper ranges
• Sound integration: All 40+ sound files loaded, SoundManager working
• Responsive/fullscreen: Proper viewport scaling with aspect ratio preservation
• Build/Lint: No errors, clean compilation

🔧 FIXED DEFECTS:
• ❌ CRITICAL: UI text mirroring - Player name badges and action indicators were unreadable when fighters faced left
  → FIXED: Added counter-transform to keep text readable regardless of fighter orientation
  → File: src/components/EnhancedFighter.tsx lines 457, 481

⚠️ REMAINING MINOR ISSUES:
• Player 2 uses same knight sprites as Player 1 (should use distinct assets)
• Attack cooldown comment vs implementation could be clearer

🎯 FINAL STATUS: READY FOR GAMEPLAY ✅
All core mechanics functional, critical UI fix applied, sounds working correctly.

⚡ Performance Optimization Complete! Eliminated render-time randomness, reduced particles 30→20, memoized calculations, stabilized animations. Bundle: 413KB (±0KB), Build: 942ms. Zero lint errors. Ready for 60fps gaming!

✅ TRUE FULLSCREEN Implementation Complete!

🔧 MODIFICATIONS MADE:
• config.ts: Converted static canvas dimensions to dynamic getters using viewport (100vw/100vh)
• Game.tsx: Removed transform:scale() approach, using direct 100% viewport container
• EnhancedArena.tsx: Updated all fixed dimensions to percentage-based (80% groundY, responsive particles)
• gameStore.ts: Dynamic player positioning (20%/80% from edges instead of fixed pixels)

📐 RESPONSIVE FEATURES:
• Canvas fills entire browser window (width: 100vw, height: 100vh)
• Player sizes scale with viewport (8% width, 25% height)
• Ground positioned at 80% from top
• Health bars, UI elements scale proportionally
• Window resize triggers position recalculation

🎮 TESTING: Dev server running on http://localhost:5173 - Game now fills full screen width!

🚀 STATUS: Ready for full-viewport gameplay experience
